content.query:
CREATE VIEW BI_Returns
 --drop view BI_Returns

AS

--E90 Returns
SELECT 
    H.WHLO AS [Warehouse],
    H.REPN AS [Receiving Number],
    L.RELI AS [Line Number],
    CASE
        WHEN L.REST IS NULL OR L.REST = '' THEN '05'
        ELSE L.REST
    END AS [Return Status],
    CASE
        WHEN L.REST IS NULL THEN 'No Lines Exist'
        WHEN L.REST = '11' THEN 'Quantity Advised'
        WHEN L.REST = '12' THEN 'Quantity Advised and Partly Received'
        WHEN L.REST = '13' THEN 'Quantity Advised and Partly Inspected'
        WHEN L.REST = '22' THEN 'Quantity Received'
        WHEN L.REST = '23' THEN 'Quantity Received and Partly Inspected'
        WHEN L.REST = '33' THEN 'Qty Inspected'
        WHEN L.REST = '90' THEN 'Deleted'
        WHEN L.REST = '99' THEN 'Closed'
        ELSE 'NA' 
    END AS [Return Status Description],
    L.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    L.SERN AS [Serial Number],
    L.WHSL AS [Location],
    L.RPA5 AS [Inspection Officer],
    TRY_CAST(
        LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.EPDT), 4) + '-' + 
        SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.EPDT), 5, 2) + '-' + 
        RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.EPDT), 2)
        AS DATE
    ) AS [Return Date],
    L.REQ0 AS [Notified Quantity],
    L.REQ1 AS [Returned Quantity],
    L.REQ2 AS [Inspection Quantity],
    L.REQ3 AS [Approved Quantity],
    L.REQ4 AS [Returned to Supplier],
    L.REQ5 AS [Returned to Customer],
    L.REQ6 AS [Rejected Quantity],
    L.REQ7 AS [Credited Quantity],
    L.REQ8 AS [Repairable Quantity],
    L.SAPR AS [Sales Price],
    L.UCOS AS [Cost Price],
    CASE 
        WHEN L.RSCD IS NOT NULL AND L.RSCD <> '' THEN L.RSCD
        WHEN H.RSCD IS NOT NULL AND H.RSCD <> '' THEN H.RSCD
        ELSE 'NA'
    END AS [Transaction Reason],
    CASE WHEN L.RSCD IS NULL OR L.RSCD = '' THEN 'NA' ELSE C.TX40 END AS [Transaction Reason Description],
    L.CRES AS [Credit Status],
    CASE 
        WHEN L.CRES = '0' THEN 'Not Credited'
        WHEN L.CRES = '1' THEN 'Partly Credited'
        WHEN L.CRES = '2' THEN 'Fully Credited'
        ELSE 'NA' 
    END AS [Credit Status Description],
    H.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
    L.RORN AS [Reference Sales Order Number],
    L.RORL AS [Reference Sales Order Line],
    L.RORX AS [Reference Sales Order Suffix],
    L.RORC AS [Reference Sales Order Category],
    H.RERE AS [Return Responsible],
    H.RESL AS [Return Order Lowest Status],
    H.RESH AS [Return Order Highest Status],
    H.CRSB AS [Credit Lowest Status],
    H.CRSH AS [Credit Highest Status],
    H.EXIN AS [Reference Sales Invoice Number],
    H.YREF AS [Reference],
    H.ORTP AS [Return Type]
FROM M3.OCHEAD H
LEFT JOIN M3.OCLINE L ON H.REPN = L.REPN
LEFT JOIN M3.CSYTAB C ON L.RSCD = C.STKY AND C.STCO = 'RSCD'


--RMA and X90
UNION ALL

SELECT
    L.WHLO AS [Warehouse],
    H.ORNO AS [Receiving Number],
    L.PONR AS [Line Number],
    NULL AS [Return Status],
    NULL AS [Return Status Description],
    L.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    O.SERN AS [Serial Number],
    NULL AS [Location],
    NULL AS [Inspection Officer],
    TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 2) AS DATE) AS [Return Date],
    (L.IVQT * -1) AS [Notified Quantity],
    (L.IVQT * -1) AS [Returned Quantity],
    NULL AS [Inspection Quantity],
    (L.IVQT * -1) AS [Approved Quantity],
    NULL AS [Returned to Supplier],
    NULL AS [Returned to Customer],
    NULL AS [Rejected Quantity],
    (L.IVQT * -1) AS [Credited Quantity],
    NULL AS [Repairable Quantity],
    L.SAPR AS [Sales Price],
    L.UCOS AS [Cost Price],
    CASE WHEN O.RSCD IS NULL OR O.RSCD = '' THEN 'NA' ELSE O.RSCD END AS [Transaction Reason],
    CASE WHEN O.RSCD IS NULL OR O.RSCD = '' THEN 'NA' ELSE C.TX40 END AS [Transaction Reason Description],
    '2' AS [Credit Status],
    'Fully Credited' AS [Credit Status Description],
    H.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
    NULL AS [Reference Sales Order Number],
    NULL AS [Reference Sales Order Line],
    NULL AS [Reference Sales Order Suffix],
    NULL AS [Reference Sales Order Category],
    NULL AS [Return Responsible],
    NULL AS [Return Order Lowest Status],
    NULL AS [Return Order Highest Status],
    NULL AS [Credit Lowest Status],
    NULL AS [Credit Highest Status],
    NULL AS [Reference Sales Invoice Number],
    NULL AS [Reference],
    H.ORTP AS [Return Type]
FROM M3.ODHEAD H
LEFT JOIN M3.ODLINE L ON H.ORNO = L.ORNO AND H.EXIN = L.EXIN AND H.DLIX = L.DLIX
LEFT JOIN M3.OOLINE O ON L.ORNO = O.ORNO AND L.PONR = O.PONR AND L.POSX = O.POSX
LEFT JOIN M3.CSYTAB C ON O.RSCD = C.STKY AND C.STCO = 'RSCD'

WHERE
    H.IVNO <> 0 AND
    H.YEA4 >= '2022' AND
    H.ORTP IN ('RMA','X90') AND
    L.LNCL <> 2
